{{Quote|Good relations with the Wookiees, I have.|Jedi Master Yoda|<ref name="Episode III">{{Film|III}}</ref>}}
The [[Wookiee]]s of the [[planet]] [[Kashyyyk]] '''defended''' their [[homeworld]] from [[Confederacy of Independent Systems]]-employed raiders in [[19 BBY]] during the [[Clone Wars]] between the CIS and [[Galactic Republic]]. The Wookiees were aided by [[Jedi Master]] [[Yoda]], who was named [[Defender of the Home Tree]],<ref name="Timelines" /> a title he also had received for aiding in tense negotiations between the [[Trandoshan]]s and Wookiees,<ref name="CL">[[Star Wars: Complete Locations (2016)|''Star Wars: Complete Locations'']]</ref> for his actions.<ref name="Timelines" /> Yoda's strong relations with the Wookiees would become important later in the Clone Wars when the CIS [[Battle of Kashyyyk|outright invaded]] Kashyyyk, which Yoda responded to by personally leading the world's defense.<ref name="Episode III" />

==Behind the scenes==
The defense of Kashyyyk was mentioned within the [[2023]] reference book ''[[Star Wars: Timelines]]''.<ref name="Timelines" /> Before its cancellation, ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars]]'' was set to feature an arc on Kashyyyk that would have seen Yoda's "good relations" with the Wookiees in action.<ref name="Celebration">{{Blogspot|subdomain=intothegarbagechute|url=2013/08/celebration-europe-ii-secrets-of-clone.html|name=Into the Garbage Chute|text=Celebration Europe II: Secrets of ''The Clone Wars''|date=2013-08-14}}</ref>
